name: Haymans Small Gin 20cl
description: At a glanceThis full-strength gin is bursting with flavour and botanical character. Just one thimbleful is all you need to create a balanced, refreshing G&T or gin cocktail with 80% less alcohol.Size20clAlcohol Vol.43%

name: Tanqueray 0.0% Alcohol Free
description: At a glanceFour botanicals are perfectly balanced to give a complex, refreshing taste with the juniper and citrus style that Tanqueray is famous for. Mix over ice with your tonic of choice and garnish with a lemon slice.Size70cl

name: CleanCo Clean G Non-Alcoholic Gin Replacement
description: At a glanceBlended and distilled using aromatic botanicals including crisp juniper, with no added sugar or sweeteners. Pour over ice, top up with light tonic and garnish with lemon and fresh mint.Size70cl

name: CleanCo Clean T Non-Alcoholic Tequila Replacement
description: At a glanceAn alcohol-free take on blanco Tequila with agave aromas, fruity flavours and a peppery dry finish. Serve over ice, topped up with tonic and a dash of Tabasco for an extra kick.Size70cl

name: Tanqueray Sevilla 0.0%
description: At a glanceTanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0.0% Alcohol Free Spirit is a zesty, fruitful flavouring, offering a bold and bittersweet taste of the sun-soaked Mediterranean,Size70cl

name: Pentire Adrift
description: At a glanceMade using plants native to the coastline, including rock samphire, headland sage and lemon citrus. Serve in an ice-filled highball, topped up with light tonic and a rosemary garnish.Size700ml
